text: my back just made a sound that doesnt exist in any language
told the drive thru i loved them instead of thank you. we both just sat there
my apartment makes noises at 3am like something is learning to walk
i check the weather app 11 times a day and still get surprised by rain
my coworker smells like fresh laundry and i cant focus on spreadsheets anymore
ate an entire sleeve of oreos at 2am standing in the dark. no regrets
the barber said trust me and now i look like a lego person
napped so hard i woke up in a diffrent decade
the vending machine took my dollar and gave me life lessons
yall need to listen to this podcast about competitive cheese rolling. changed my life
im 28 and my knee just predicted tomorrows weather better than my phone
my uber driver was playing my exact sad playlist and we both pretended not to notice
havent left this couch since tuesday. the cushions have accepted me as one of their own
woke up with a hangover and a receipt for 47 dollars at waffle house
asked for a trim. barber gave me a whole new identity
theres a podcast about haunted laundromats and honestly it explains a lot
my crush at work said nice shirt and i didnt speak for 3 hours
turned 30 and now i make a noise every time i sit down
the ghost in my apartment keeps turning the thermostat down. rude honestly
drive thru person asked if i wanted sauce and i said you too
i refreshed the weather radar 6 times during lunch. its a hobby now
someone microwaved fish in the breakroom again. this is why we cant have nice things
my haircut makes me look like i have opinions about crypto
fell asleep on the bus and woke up at the end of the line. twice
theres a podcast where two guys rank every gas station. im on episode 47
my left ankle sounds like a bag of chips when i walk upstairs
ate a whole pizza alone and the delivery guy said see you tomorrow. he was right
the woman in 4B plays harp at midnight. either shes a ghost or i am
ordered a medium coffee and got someones entire backstory from the barista
my coworker wears this cologne that makes meetings feel like a first date
checked the weather app, closed it, then immediately opened it again
im 26 and already have a favorite spatula
the drive thru speaker asked me to repeat myself 4 times. we are not communicating
my barber talks about his ex the entire time. i know too much now
napped for 20 minutes and had 3 full dreams with character development
the vending machine glass is scratched from people hitting it. solidarity
nobody asked but theres a podcast about competitive dog grooming thats actually fire
woke up sore from sleeping. aging is just getting injured by your own bed
my apartment door opens by itself sometimes. im choosing not to investigate
accidentally called my boss mom today. we made eye contact and agreed to forget it
the weather app says 60% rain. what am i supposed to do with 60%
ate lunch at 10:45am. dinner at 4pm. i am my grandparents now
drive thru gave me somone elses order and honestly theirs was better
my new haircut makes me look like a substitute teacher from 2004
theres a true crime podcast but for lost socks. not kidding. its good
fell asleep during a meeting and nobody noticed. either im stealthy or invisible
my coworker laughs and i forget what year it is
i sneezed and threw out my back. this is my life now
the lights in the hallway flicker every night at 11:11. cool cool cool
vending machine B3 is a scam and i will die on this hill
my uber driver recommended a podcast about raccoons. now im 12 episodes deep
got a haircut and my own dog barked at me
weather app said sunny so i left my umbrella. weather app is a liar
ordered at the drive thru and the car behind me was my therapist
i eat my feelings and my feelings are always hungry
turned 32 and now i get excited about new sponges
my apartment smells like old books but i dont own any books
took a 15 min nap that lasted 3 hours. time is fake
the intern smiled at me and i planned our wedding in my head
woke up with a bruise i cannot explain. the night shift body is wilding
my knees crack so loud the dog thinks someone is at the door
theres a podcast where they review gas station bathrooms and its weirdly calming
the drive thru forgot my fries and now i have trust issues
my barber gave me bangs without asking. we are no longer friends
the breakroom fridge is a crime scene and nobody is investigating
checked the weather for a city i have no plans to visit. twice
my couch has a permanent dent in the shape of my body. art
the elevator in my building stops on floors nobody pressed. haunted or broken idk
ate cereal for dinner and felt like a genius and a failure at the same time
my hip popped so loud in yoga everyone thought it was a prop
fell asleep reading and woke up on a completely different chapter
my work crush said good morning first and i peaked. its all downhill
nobody asked but listen to the podcast about competitive jigsaw puzzles. trust me
the drive thru speaker sounds like its underwater and we're both just guessing
got id'd at 34 and it was the best day of my entire life
the weather app has a radar loop and i watch it like its netflix
my apartment has a cold spot in the kitchen. landlord says its fine. its not fine
haircut so bad i wore a hat for 2 weeks straight
the vending machine gave me two snacks once and ive been chasing that high since
i nap competitively at this point. personal best is falling asleep in 90 seconds
my coworker brought homemade cookies and i would literally do anything for them now
im 29 and i just said oof getting up from a chair. its starting
theres a podcast about people who talk to their plants. im the guest next week
ordered a number 4 at the drive thru and they gave me a number 7 life
stress ate a whole bag of chips while reading about healthy eating. poetic
woke up at 3am to footsteps above me. i live on the top floor
the weather says partly cloudy which means absolutely nothing and i love it
my barber asked who cut my hair last time. it was him. awkward
havent moved in 6 hours. the couch and i are one organism now
my hangover told me to drink water and i told it to mind its business
theres a podcast ranking every type of cloud and im not even embarassed
drive thru worker and i have a bond now. she knows my order by heart
my shoulder just did something it has never done before and i dont like it
fell asleep in the waiting room and the receptionist let me sleep. bless her
the office crush wore a new jacket today and i lost all motor function
my fridge hums a note thats almost music. almost
ate breakfast for dinner and dinner for breakfast. society cant hold me
my weather app has more screen time than any other app. no shame
asked the vending machine nicely this time. still robbed me
im aging so fast my passport photo looks like my younger brother
listen to the podcast about people who collect hotel soaps. youre welcome
